title: Ryan McMahon blames attorney for term-limit screwup (Good Morning CNY)
summary: County Executive Ryan McMahon attributed a term-limit compliance error to his attorney rather than accepting direct responsibility. The incident involves a procedural or legal mistake related to term limit regulations, potentially affecting McMahon's eligibility or tenure. This reflects governance and accountability concerns within the executive office.

political_signal.description: Public attribution of administrative error to legal counsel suggests potential governance lapses or accountability deflection, attracting media scrutiny of executive office operations.
